The Grail's light watches from above, judging not your strength but the quality of your compassion.
encounters.failureConsequence: The illusion fades and the Grail's light dims to a cold ember. You are left standing in an empty courtyard, the way forward barred until you understand what mercy truly asks.

encounters.name: Oracle Trial
encounters.description: Three stone basins stand before a crumbling shrine, each filled with a different liquid — clear water, dark wine, and shimmering quicksilver. The Oracle's voice echoes from nowhere, demanding you pour the truth into the vessel of worth. The wrong offering will shatter more than stone.
encounters.failureConsequence: The quicksilver hisses and the basins crack. The Oracle's voice turns cold, declaring you unworthy. A creeping doubt settles in your mind that lingers long after you leave the ruined shrine.

encounters.name: Riddle Door
encounters.description: A weathered stone door bars the path, carved with a riddling verse in old script. Three symbols gleam faintly in the rock — sun, moon, and star — and the inscription demands the traveller choose wisely or not at all.
encounters.failureConsequence: The wrong symbol flares hot beneath your palm. The door remains sealed and the path ahead is blocked, forcing a long and weary detour through the bramble.

encounters.name: Trial of Worth
encounters.description: Beyond the golem's reach, a chamber of polished stone presents three pedestals, each bearing a different offering — a crown, a sword, and a loaf of bread. An inscription on the wall reads: Only the worthy may pass. Choose what matters most, and the way shall open.
encounters.failureConsequence: You choose poorly, and the pedestals sink into the floor with a grinding finality. The chamber seals itself, and you must find another route through the ruins.

encounters.name: Merchant Negotiation
encounters.description: A shrewd peddler blocks the road with his overloaded cart, offering passage only to those who can strike a fair bargain. His eyes gleam as he sizes up your purse, but a silver tongue may win more than coin ever could.
encounters.failureConsequence: The merchant sneers at your poor haggling and doubles his prices. You overpay dearly for meagre supplies, losing coin and dignity in equal measure.

encounters.name: Noble Court
encounters.description: A minor lord holds court beneath a faded pavilion, dispensing judgment to those who seek his favour. Courtiers whisper behind painted fans, and every word carries the weight of alliance or exile. Only the most eloquent will leave with honour intact.
encounters.failureConsequence: Your words falter before the assembled court. The lord dismisses you with a wave, and his guards escort you roughly from the pavilion. Whispers of your disgrace will precede you down the road.

encounters.name: Confrontation at the Monastery
encounters.description: The abbot of Pilgrim's Rest bars the cloister door, flanked by stern-faced brothers. He accuses you of bringing trouble to their peaceful house and demands you answer for the commotion your arrival has caused. His voice is calm, but his eyes are unyielding.
encounters.failureConsequence: The abbot orders the gates closed against you. The monastery's shelter and supplies are denied, and you must press on without rest into the gathering dusk.

encounters.name: Tavern Brawl
encounters.description: Raised voices and shattered crockery erupt from a roadside alehouse. Two farmers grapple over a spilled drink while the innkeeper wrings her hands. A well-placed word might calm the storm — or a poor one could drag you into the fray.
encounters.failureConsequence: Your intervention backfires spectacularly. A wild punch catches your jaw, the innkeeper bars you from her establishment, and you nurse a bruised ego along with a swollen lip.

encounters.name: Guard Evasion
encounters.description: Torchlight sweeps the gatehouse passage in steady arcs. Two sentries pace the wall-walk above while a third guards the postern door. Timing, patience, and the cover of a moonless night are your only allies.
encounters.failureConsequence: A loose cobblestone betrays your step. The sentries close in and march you back to the town gate, barring re-entry until the next watch change.

encounters.name: Sneaking Through the Old Mill
encounters.description: The old watermill stands dark against the evening sky, its wheel still turning with a rhythmic creak. Smugglers have made it their storehouse, and a pair of lookouts warm their hands by a brazier near the door. You must slip past them to reach the passage beyond.
encounters.failureConsequence: A loose board groans underfoot and the lookouts spring to their feet. You are chased into the night and must circle back by a longer path, losing precious hours.

encounters.name: Prison Break
encounters.description: The stone corridors of the oubliette echo with the clank of iron boots. A prisoner whispers through the bars, begging for freedom. To reach the cell keys, you must slip past three patrols and a watchful turnkey who never seems to blink.
encounters.failureConsequence: A guard spots your shadow and raises the alarm. You are seized and thrown into a cell yourself, losing a full day before a sympathetic jailer lets you slip away at dawn.

encounters.name: Caravan Infiltration
encounters.description: A merchant caravan bound for Ravensgate camps beside the road, its wagons circled and guards patrolling with lanterns. Hidden among the crates is something you need. You must slip between the wagons unseen, past drowsy guards and restless horses.
encounters.failureConsequence: A horse whinnies at your scent and a guard swings his lantern your way. You are seized and marched to the caravan master, who confiscates your weapons before releasing you at dawn.

encounters.name: The Library Heist
encounters.description: Ravensgate's library is a tall, narrow tower of honeyed stone, its shelves guarded by a sharp-eared archivist and a pair of sleepless clerks. The documents you seek lie in a locked cabinet on the upper gallery, and every footstep on the old oak floor carries like a drumbeat.
encounters.failureConsequence: The archivist catches you rifling through the cabinet and raises the alarm. You are escorted from the tower under guard and barred from the library until you can explain yourself.

encounters.name: River Crossing
encounters.description: Spring meltwater has swollen the river to a churning torrent. The old ford is submerged and the nearest bridge lies a day's walk upstream. Fallen timber and slippery stones offer a treacherous path across, but one misstep could sweep you downstream.
encounters.failureConsequence: The current catches your legs and drags you under. You claw your way to the far bank, gasping and half-drowned, but your pack is lighter — the river claimed a portion of your supplies.

encounters.name: Wilderness Storm
encounters.description: Black clouds boil over the moors and the wind turns savage. Rain lashes the road to mud, lightning splits an oak on the hillside, and the temperature plummets. Finding shelter and keeping a fire alive may be the difference between life and a frozen end.
encounters.failureConsequence: The cold sinks into your bones and the rain extinguishes your last torch. You stumble on through the dark, arriving at shelter soaked and shivering, losing precious supplies to the downpour.
